title: Xanthomyrtus compacta
intro: Xanthomyrtus compacta, also known as the compact xanthomyrtus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, offering potential health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in protecting against oxidative stress, inflammation, and infections. The bioactive constituents of Xanthomyrtus compacta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other secondary metabolites, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.

uses: Xanthomyrtus compacta is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties.
